allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
feat: multi-account management, DB persistence, rotation & admin dashboard

- Add multi-account support with round-robin rotation via Proxy + AsyncLocalStorage
- Add database persistence layer with support for PostgreSQL, MySQL, MongoDB, and in-memory
- Add account lifecycle management \(add/remove/enable/disable/refresh\)
- Add automatic error detection: marks accounts dead \(401\), forbidden \(403\), or rate-limited \(429\)
- Add rate-limit auto-recovery with configurable retry-after timers
- Add admin API with JWT auth for account CRUD, device flow, usage stats, and settings
- Add React + Vite + Tailwind web dashboard at /dashboard
- Add request logging per-account for bill splitting visibility
- Minimal changes to existing files \(8 modified\) using Proxy pattern for merge safety
- Backwards compatible: works as single-account mode without DATABASE_URL

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit --no-verify -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
feat: multi-account management, DB persistence, rotation & admin dashboard

- Add multi-account support with round-robin rotation via Proxy + AsyncLocalStorage
- Add database persistence layer with support for PostgreSQL, MySQL, MongoDB, and in-memory
- Add account lifecycle management \(add/remove/enable/disable/refresh\)
- Add automatic error detection: marks accounts dead \(401\), forbidden \(403\), or rate-limited \(429\)
- Add rate-limit auto-recovery with configurable retry-after timers
- Add admin API with JWT auth for account CRUD, device flow, usage stats, and settings
- Add React + Vite + Tailwind web dashboard at /dashboard
- Add request logging per-account for bill splitting visibility
- Minimal changes to existing files \(8 modified\) using Proxy pattern for merge safety
- Backwards compatible: works as single-account mode without DATABASE_URL

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit --no-verify -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
feat: enhance account manager with bulk actions, inline editing, and extended settings

- Add refreshAllAccounts, resetAllCounters, rebalanceRotationWeights bulk actions
- Add admin routes for bulk actions \(/accounts/actions/*\)
- Add inline edit UI for account limits/label/weight in AccountCard
- Extend runtime settings: limitEnforcementEnabled, autoDisableFreeExhausted,
  autoDisableOnLimitReached, defaultMaxRequests, defaultRateLimitCooldown
- Add disabledAccounts count to stats endpoint
- Update dashboard pages to reflect new settings and actions

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit --no-verify -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
fix: improve Dockerfile, entrypoint.sh, and README for multi-account setup

- Switch web UI build stage to node:22-alpine for reliable npm ci
- Fix web dist copy path in Dockerfile
- Add NODE_ENV=production and healthcheck wget dependency
- Rewrite entrypoint.sh with proper subcommand routing and GH_TOKEN injection
- Update README with PostgreSQL, MySQL, and MongoDB Docker examples
- Add .gitattributes

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit --no-verify -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
feat: update Dockerfile, README, and startup improvements

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit --no-verify -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
chore: update Dockerfile and bun.lock

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
